name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Met during freshman year at NYU. Always down for weekend mountain trails or planning our next backpacking trip.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Grew up on the same street. We still team up online every couple of weeks for cooperative tactical shooters.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Former marketing lead at my last job. Our mutual love for spicy street food keeps us hunting for new restaurants.

name: David Kim
bio: Gave me my first break in tech. Grab coffee every few months to talk about career growth, UI trends, and books.

name: Chloe Thompson
bio: Lives two doors down. We act as each other's accountability partners for morning weightlifting sessions.

name: Arjun Mehta
bio: Played guitar together in a terrible teenage garage band. He still sends me underground indie rock recommendations.

name: Jessica Taylor
bio: Co-founder of our local monthly sci-fi book club. We end up texting memes about plot holes almost every day.

name: Michael Foster
bio: Met at an open-source hackathon event. Currently bouncing SaaS ideas back and forth for a potential side project.

name: Amina Diop
bio: Met while volunteering in Senegal. Lives across the ocean now, so we catch up via long, rare video calls.

name: Ryan Gallagher
bio: Part of the weekly Friday night board game group. Hosts complex strategy game sessions at his apartment.
